doc
Table of Contents

Class Blackjack

Namespace
Blackjack_Class_Library
Assembly
Blackjack_Class_Library.dll

Represents a game of Blackjack, managing the state, player and dealer hands, betting, and game logic.

public class Blackjack

Constructors

Blackjack()

Initializes a new instance of the Blackjack class, setting up the card shoe, player and dealer hands, player credit, bet, and game state.

public Blackjack()

currentState 

public BlackjackState currentState { get; }

BlackjackState

playerBet

double

List<Card>

playerValue 

public int playerValue { get; }

Property Value

int

Methods

CanDoubleDown()

Determines whether the player is eligible to double down based on the current game state, hand size, and bet status.

public bool CanDoubleDown()

Returns

bool

true if the player can double down; otherwise, false.

DealCards(List<Card>, int)

Deals n cards to either the player or the dealer, specified with toPlayer

public List<Card> DealCards(List<Card> toHand, int n = 1)

Parameters

toHand List<Card>

The hand the cards are dealt to

n int

The number of cards to deal

Returns

List<Card>

The hand with cards dealt to it

DealerHandSize()

Gets the number of cards in the dealer's hand.

public int DealerHandSize()

Returns

int

The count of cards currently held by the dealer.

DealerHandValue()

Calculates and returns the total value of the dealer's hand.

public int DealerHandValue()

Returns

int

The total integer value of the dealer's hand.

DealerTurn()

Executes the dealer's turn in the Blackjack game, updating the dealer's hand and game state according to standard rules.

public void DealerTurn()

EndGame()

Ends the current blackjack game, determines the outcome based on player and dealer hands, and outputs the result.

public BlackjackResult EndGame()

Returns

BlackjackResult

A BlackjackResult value indicating the outcome of the game.

HandToString(List<Card>)

Returns a comma-separated string of card IDs from the given hand.

public static string HandToString(List<Card> hand)

Parameters

hand List<Card>

The list of Card objects representing the hand.

Returns

string

A string containing the IDs of the cards in the hand, separated by commas.

HandValue(List<Card>)

Calculates the total value of a hand of cards, treating aces as 1 or 11 to maximize the hand's value without exceeding 21.

public static int HandValue(List<Card> hand)

Parameters

hand List<Card>

The list of cards whose value is to be calculated.

Returns

int

The total value of the hand.

HiddenDealerCards()

Calculates the number of hidden cards in the dealer's hand.

public int HiddenDealerCards()

Returns

int

The number of dealer cards not visible to the player.

LookAtDealerHand()

Returns the dealer's hand, hiding the first card during the player's turn.

public List<Card> LookAtDealerHand()

Returns

List<Card>

A list of cards representing the dealer's hand, with the first card removed if it is the player's turn.

PlaceBet(double)

Places a bet for the player if sufficient credit is available and no game is in progress.

public void PlaceBet(double bet)

Parameters

bet double

The amount to bet.

Exceptions

Exception

Thrown if the bet exceeds available credit, a game is in progress, or the bet amount is zero or negative.

PlayerTurn(BlackjackAction)

Processes the player's action during their turn in a game of Blackjack.

public void PlayerTurn(BlackjackAction playerAction)

Parameters

playerAction BlackjackAction

The action chosen by the player, such as Hit or Stand.

ShoeCount()

Returns the number of cards currently in the shoe.

public int ShoeCount()

Returns

int

The number of cards in the card shoe.

ShowPlayerCredit() 

public void ShowPlayerCredit()

StartBlackjack()

Initializes and starts a new game of blackjack, dealing cards to the player and dealer and updating the game state.

public void StartBlackjack()
